title: Dry Bulk Shipping - February 19, 2019
summary: Dry bulk rates bottoming - The steep decline in dry bulk rates is slowly coming to an end, in our view. Higher scrapping, IMO 2020, the silver linings - Several negative factors have contributed to the recent Demand growth is coming to halt - Chinese bulk commodity import growth is now negative on a 12-month Short term neutral - We expect Panamax and Supramax rates to slowly recover and approach double digits Long term neutral - Slower economic growth and the maturing nature of the Chinese economy when it
